# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import { getRepository } from 'typeorm';

const router = express.Router();

type ProductSearchQuery = {
  q?: string;
  category?: string | string[];
  brand?: string | string[];
  minPrice?: string;
  maxPrice?: string;
  inStock?: string;
  ratingMin?: string;
  ratingMax?: string;
  sortBy?: string;
  sortDir?: string;
  limit?: string;
  offset?: string;
};

type SqlParamValue = string | number | boolean | null;

function toStringArray(value: unknown): string[] {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.map(String).filter(Boolean);
  if (typeof value === 'string' && value.trim()) return value.split(',').map((v) => v.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  return [];
}

function toNumber(value: unknown): number | undefined {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') return undefined;
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function toBoolean(value: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') return undefined;
  const v = String(value).toLowerCase().trim();
  if (['true', '1', 'yes', 'y'].includes(v)) return true;
  if (['false', '0', 'no', 'n'].includes(v)) return false;
  return undefined;
}

function buildInClause(values: string[], params: Record<string, SqlParamValue>, keyPrefix: string): string {
  const placeholders = values.map((value, index) => {
    const key = `${keyPrefix}${index}`;
    params[key] = value;
    return `:${key}`;
  });
  return placeholders.join(', ');
}

router.get('/products/search', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  try {
    const query = req.query as ProductSearchQuery;

    const q = typeof query.q === 'string' ? query.q.trim() : '';
    const categories = toStringArray(query.category);
    const brands = toStringArray(query.brand);
    const minPrice = toNumber(query.minPrice);
    const maxPrice = toNumber(query.maxPrice);
    const inStock = toBoolean(query.inStock);
    const ratingMin = toNumber(query.ratingMin);
    const ratingMax = toNumber(query.ratingMax);

    const sortByRaw = typeof query.sortBy === 'string' ? query.sortBy : 'created_at';
    const sortDirRaw = typeof query.sortDir === 'string' ? query.sortDir.toUpperCase() : 'DESC';
    const sortDir = sortDirRaw === 'ASC' ? 'ASC' : 'DESC';

    const allowedSortColumns: Record<string, string> = {
      name: 'p.name',
      price: 'p.price',
      rating: 'p.rating',
      created_at: 'p.created_at',
      updated_at: 'p.updated_at',
    };
    const sortBy = allowedSortColumns[sortByRaw] ?? 'p.created_at';

    const limit = Math.min(Math.max(toNumber(query.limit) ?? 20, 1), 100);
    const offset = Math.max(toNumber(query.offset) ?? 0, 0);

    const params: Record<string, SqlParamValue> = {};
    const where: string[] = [];

    if (q) {
      params.q = `%${q}%`;
      where.push('(p.name ILIKE :q OR p.description ILIKE :q)');
    }

    if (categories.length > 0) {
      where.push(`p.category IN (${buildInClause(categories, params, 'category')})`);
    }

    if (brands.length > 0) {
      where.push(`p.brand IN (${buildInClause(brands, params, 'brand')})`);
    }

    if (typeof minPrice === 'number') {
      params.minPrice = minPrice;
      where.push('p.price >= :minPrice');
    }

    if (typeof maxPrice === 'number') {
      params.maxPrice = maxPrice;
      where.push('p.price <= :maxPrice');
    }

    if (typeof inStock === 'boolean') {
      params.inStock = inStock;
      where.push('p.in_stock = :inStock');
    }

    if (typeof ratingMin === 'number') {
      params.ratingMin = ratingMin;
      where.push('p.rating >= :ratingMin');
    }

    if (typeof ratingMax === 'number') {
      params.ratingMax = ratingMax;
      where.push('p.rating <= :ratingMax');
    }

    const whereSql = where.length ? `WHERE ${where.join(' AND ')}` : '';

    const sql = `
      SELECT
        p.id,
        p.name,
        p.description,
        p.category,
        p.brand,
        p.price,
        p.in_stock,
        p.rating,
        p.created_at,
        p.updated_at
      FROM products p
      ${whereSql}
      ORDER BY ${sortBy} ${sortDir}
      LIMIT ${limit}
      OFFSET ${offset}
    `;

    const countSql = `
      SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
      FROM products p
      ${whereSql}
    `;

    const repository = getRepository('Product');
    const [rows, countRows] = await Promise.all([
      repository.query(sql, Object.values(params)),
      repository.query(countSql, Object.values(params)),
    ]);

    const total = countRows?.[0]?.total ?? 0;

    res.json({
      data: rows,
      meta: {
        total,
        limit,
        offset,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    res.status(500).json({
      message: 'Failed to search products',
    });
  }
});

export default router;
